title: The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious
summary: Claude Fable 5 faces backlash for refusing harmless prompts, triggering false safety alarms, and limiting AI-related work through opaque guardrails. Users question whether they receive the actual model or a weakened fallback version, raising concerns about trust in closed AI systems.
writeup: The video covers user backlash against Claude Fable 5 over its safety behavior: refusals on harmless prompts, false safety alarms, and opaque guardrails that limit AI-related work. It matters because the complaints feed a broader trust problem with closed AI systems, including suspicion that users receive a weakened fallback model rather than the advertised one. The concrete points concern the friction caused by safety filters and model guardrails, and the alignment and adaptive control choices behind them.
